summary: Comprehensive testing of Nagarik Delivery Health Dashboard (iteration 4). All backend tests passed (16/16). UI testing verified Delivery Health section with all data-testids, throughput badge, empty state. Regression tests passed for both guardian and operator login flows.
critical_code_review_comments: throughput_per_minute correctly calculated as sent_count/window_minutes when window_minutes provided
throughput_per_minute correctly returns null when no window_minutes param
Stats API returns correct totals dict keyed by status (pending, retrying, sent, dead_letter, cancelled)
Stats API returns correct by_channel breakdown dict (email, sms, push)
DeliveryHealth component correctly handles empty state with message 'No notification jobs in this window'
All 5 status cards have correct data-testid attributes: delivery-stat-{status}
Throughput badge has data-testid='throughput-rate' and displays '0 msg/min' correctly
Frontend calls stats API with ?window_minutes=15 as expected
RBAC working correctly - guardian gets 403 on operator stats endpoint

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Delivery Health UI elements verified

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test notification_jobs during backend testing to verify stats accuracy
context_for_next_testing_agent: Delivery Health feature complete. Stats API at /api/operator/notification-jobs/stats returns throughput_per_minute (sent_count/window_minutes) when window_minutes param is provided, null otherwise. UI shows 5 status cards, throughput badge, and empty state when no jobs exist. The notification_jobs table may be empty in production - that's expected and the UI handles it gracefully.

backend_api_tests: Guardian login returns token and role
Operator login returns token and role
Stats with window_minutes returns throughput_per_minute as number
Stats returns totals dict by status
Stats totals correct with seeded data
False alarm metrics endpoint still works (regression)
Notification jobs list endpoint still works (regression)
frontend_ui_tests: All 5 status cards visible: pending, retrying, sent, dead_letter, cancelled
Throughput rate badge visible showing '0 msg/min'
Empty state displayed: 'No notification jobs in this window'

verified_features: Throughput calculated as sent_count / window_minutes when window provided
Throughput is null when no window_minutes parameter
DeliveryHealth UI component displays status totals (5 cards)
DeliveryHealth shows empty state when no notification jobs
DeliveryHealth integrated into Operator Console Dashboard via fetchData
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
